nasb.text: and because of it he is obligated to offer sacrifices for sins, as for the people, so also for himself.

esv.text: Because of this he is obligated to offer sacrifice for his own sins just as he does for those of the people.

cnv.text: 因此，他怎樣為人民的罪獻祭，也應該怎樣為自己的罪獻祭。

ccb.text: 所以，他不但要为众人的罪献祭，也要为自己的罪献祭。

csbs.text: 因此，他怎样替子民为罪献祭，也必须照样替自己为罪献祭。
